title: elaeocarpus micranthus
intro: Elaeocarpus micranthus, also known as the dwarf blue cherry or blue cherry, is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae. It is native to Australia and is a small shrub or tree that is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce fever and inflammation. The leaves and stems of the Elaeocarpus micranthus plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to take advantage of its health benefits and medicinal properties.
